prompt: A Renaissance-style grand composition blending iconic visionaries across history — Da Vinci sketching mechanical blueprints, Ada Lovelace writing algorithms, Nikola Tesla surrounded by electrical arcs, a modern engineer at glowing terminal screens — all connected by luminous neural network threads weaving between them like a constellation. The threads converge into a central radiant node symbolizing AI orchestration. Warm golden light from the left, deep blue-purple atmospheric depth on the right. Painterly brushwork meets digital precision. Epic, cerebral, timeless.
